channel.title: jb-marketplace-plugins-jetbrains
channel.description: The latest JetBrains plugins on the JetBrains marketplace
channel.dc:creator: Jonathan Lermitage

item.title: Class Hint - Mon Jun 22 00:51:49 UTC 2026
item.description:
Displays Chinese class descriptions next to Java class nodes in the IntelliJ IDEA Project View.
vendor: Class Hint downloads: 0 pricingModel: FREE xmlId: com.github.chineseclasshint

item.title: Seen - Mon Jun 22 08:08:59 UTC 2026
item.description:

vendor: xeinebiu downloads: 1 pricingModel: FREE xmlId: com.github.xeinebiu.seen

item.title: OpenCode Web Panel - Sun Jun 21 21:32:28 UTC 2026
item.description:

vendor: Moritzf downloads: 2 pricingModel: FREE xmlId: de.moritzf.opencodewebpanel

item.title: TermGlyph - Sun Jun 21 18:13:50 UTC 2026
item.description:
